title: nchs~
description: get number of channels from multi-channel connections

messages.description: signal to query number of channels

body: [nchs~] gets the number of channels from a multi-channel connection, as provided by [snake~ in], [clone] or other objects. The object outputs values whenever the DSP chain gets updated and you can also query for the number of channels with a bang message. It also works in subpatches or abstractions because [inlet~] is also multi-channel aware.
